title: 3.28.0b Hotfix 2
full_text:
3.28.0b Hotfix 2
3.28.0b Hotfix 2
Fixed a bug that allowed the quest chemist's strongbox in the grain gate to produce flasks above 20% quality.
Fixed a bug where the pustules spawned by Faridun Warlock Spectres were considered to be on the enemy team, preventing completion of Simulacrum or Coward's Trial Waves while they were alive.
